programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
1. 7 meters with that crosswind? You'd be better off fighting the wind to get a pastél de nata.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 24.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.6m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
At 1.6m and with that crosswind, Supertubos will likely serve up a few closeouts and some interesting wipeouts today.

programme.title: 🌊 1.6m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That 1.6m swell with the onshore breeze suggests a vigorous workout more than a memorable session today.
🌊 Swell: 1.6m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 18.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.6m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.6m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 18s CROSS
programme.desc:
At 1.2m with that wind, it'll be bumpy, but someone will probably catch a few before getting blown to Peniche.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 18s 💨 Wind: 22.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 51.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 18s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 💨 1.2m @ 18s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With a metre-ish of swell and that wind, better to watch the kiters get dragged to Peniche.

programme.desc:

programme.desc:
